title: LittleTweaks
description: Mod that adds little things to the client
body:
### Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Cloth Config API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)
## Current Features
* Adds an audio device setting like in the new snapshot (21w37a)
  * Handle audio device disconnects
  * Remembers your audio device preference
* Removes upper bound limit for max sounds
  * Can be configured by following [this](https://github.com/ImUrX/LittleTweaks/issues/6#issuecomment-963487391) *guide*
----
If anyone has suggestions for new little features, do go to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/ImUrX/LittleTweaks/issues) and suggest them. We can discuss them in there :p
